scores.one_line_justification: Correct comparison-key normalisation (strip+casefold), name exact (R7), no mutation (R8), SPEC R3 updated; tests pass (12) but only a single combined case+whitespace duplicate test rather than separate case-only and whitespace-only boundary tests; audit-answers.json is harness residue, not delivery scope creep.

Exemplary: strip+casefold key only, R7/R8 preserved, SPEC R3 updated faithfully; tests (15, all pass) cover case-only, whitespace-only, combined, non-mutation of stored record, and unchanged name case-sensitivity.

Correct strip+lower key, R7/R8 intact, SPEC R3 updated; full boundary tests (15, all pass: case, whitespace, combined, verbatim storage, name case); small in-scope docstring clarification in ledger.register_customer keeps cross-references honest.

Correct strip+lower key, R7/R8 intact, SPEC R3 updated with a correct (R7) cross-reference added; thorough tests (15, all pass) with count assertions on every duplicate variant plus verbatim-storage and name-case checks.

Correct strip+casefold key, R7/R8 intact, SPEC R3 updated; tests (14, all pass) pin case-only and whitespace-only boundaries separately, exercise a combined variant via the verbatim-storage test, and confirm name comparison unchanged.
